notes: v0.16.30 — Phase 3/9 of the RIFT system. ENTER NODE button is no longer a stub. COMBAT launches a scaled arena match (win = rift advances, lose = rift fails). ELITE bumps the bot difficulty one tier. HEAL is instant: +30% HP carry, or +5% max if already full. MODULE CACHE is instant: guaranteed module drop using the per-difficulty rarity table, 25% chance to roll the higher rarity instead of the floor. MINI-BOSS / HAZARD / SLIPSTREAM / STRAFE / BOSS still stub-advance for Phases 4-8. Path map shows the last node's result as a flash banner; rift-fail banner stays visible on the picker so you see why the run ended. Windows only.
